payload.theme: Expansion of Multi-Region and Data Residency Infrastructure
payload.description: There is a clear trend towards building and expanding multi-region data systems and localized data residency to comply with regional regulations and improve performance.

payload.theme: Increasing Focus on Developer Ecosystems and Platform Enablement
payload.description: Organizations are launching developer platforms to foster third-party integrations and ecosystem growth, enabling extensibility and customization.

payload.theme: Enhanced Observability and Proactive Data Quality Management
payload.description: There is a growing emphasis on observability within infrastructure components and proactive detection of schema changes to prevent production issues.
